thought.text: I will run `bin/rails routes` to verify that the new routes for services, staff members, time slots, and bookings are drawn under both the `:organization` and `customer` route groups.

action.command: GEM_HOME="" GEM_PATH="" rbenv exec bundle exec bin/rails routes | grep -E "services|staff_members|time_slots|bookings"

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "GEM_HOME=\"\" GEM_PATH=\"\" rbenv exec bundle exec bin/rails routes | grep -E \"services|staff_members|time_slots|bookings\"", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Check generated routes"}
